name: Chocolate Chip Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat griddle.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, sugar, cinnamon, baking powder, and salt.
Mix together liquid ingredients (milk, eggs, melted butter, and vanilla) and beat into the dry mixture until smooth.
3. Fold in chocolate chips.
4. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each pancake.
5. Turn pancakes when the tops are covered with bubbles and the edges look dry (about 1 minute).
6. Cook for an additional 1 minute on the other side.
7. Repeat steps.
8. Serve with Mrs. Butterworth's Syrup. Makes 10 to 12 pancakes.
